docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY FRANKEL, MATTHEW

PLAINTIFF HAS SERVED THIS LAWSUIT ON DEFENDANT IN NEW JERSEY. UNDER CAL. CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 116.340(E), A SMALL CLAIMS ACTION MUST BE SERVED ON DEFENDANT IN CALIFORNIA (EXCEPT IN VERY LIMITED SITUATIONS WHICH ARE NOT APPLICABLE HERE.) THEREFORE, THE MATTER IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT'S RULING IS IN NO WAY INTENDED TO PRECLUDE PLAINTIFF FROM REFILING IN SMALL CLAIMS COURT IF THE DEFENDANT IS SERVED IN CALIFORNIA, OR THE ACTION IS FILED OUTSIDE OF THE JURISDICTION OF THE SMALL CLAIMS COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: D. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,955.00 FILED BY FRANKEL, MATTHEW AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, TRACIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-18-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-18-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-18-2009 BY PRO TEM.JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. EXHIBITS RETAINED.
